name: Semantic & Hybrid Search
description: Provides vector-based semantic search over features, source file chunks, and task history using Voyage AI embeddings stored in SQLite. Combines vector similarity, keyword scoring, symbol matching, and task history for hybrid relevance ranking.

Constants/EmbeddingConstants.cs.content:
class EmbeddingConstants
  L11: VoyageCodeModel: string = "voyage-code-3"
  L14: VoyageTextModel: string = "voyage-3-large"
  L17: VoyageMultimodalModel: string = "voyage-multimodal-3"
  L20: EmbeddingDimension: int = 1024
  L23: EmbeddingByteSize: int = EmbeddingDimension * sizeof(float)
  L26: BinaryEmbeddingByteSize: int = EmbeddingDimension / 8
  L31: MaxBatchSize: int = 128
  L34: MaxBatchTokens: int = 100_000
  L40: MaxApiRetries: int = 3
  L48: EmbeddingsDir: string = "embeddings"
  L51: VectorDbFileName: string = "vectors.db"
  L54: EmbeddingCacheExtension: string = ".bin"
  L57: SchemaVersion: int = 1
  L62: PreFilterK: int = 100
  L65: DefaultTopK: int = 10
  L68: MinVectorScore: float = 0.25f
  L74: FusionWeightVector: double = 0.45
  L77: FusionWeightKeyword: double = 0.25
  L80: FusionWeightSymbol: double = 0.15
  L83: FusionWeightHistory: double = 0.10
  L86: FusionWeightDependency: double = 0.05
  L94: HaikuSkipHighConfidence: double = 0.80
  L100: HaikuSkipMediumConfidence: double = 0.60
  L103: HaikuSkipMaxCandidates: int = 3
  L108: TargetChunkTokens: int = 512
  L111: ChunkOverlapTokens: int = 64
  L114: MaxChunksPerFile: int = 20
  L117: MinChunkChars: int = 100
  L122: MaxReembedFilesPerUpdate: int = 50

patterns: SQLite-backed vector persistence with batch upsert
Two-phase search: binary hamming pre-filter then full cosine rerank
dependencies: Calls Voyage AI REST API for embeddings
